title: VEC-107 Ryoko Murakami whose bride was taken down by a masseuse - Ryoko Murakami (Rikako Nakamura, Naho Kuroki)
overview: Ryoko, a tired bride, decides to go to a massage shop in front of the station with her husband. The masseuse recommends Ryoko an oil massage and plays with her ripe body. Ryoko, who was frustrated with her husband recently because she was confused by the radical masseuse's hand, could not refuse the pleasure after a long absence.
